description: This image displays the logo for a land monitoring service, likely the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS). The logo features a stylized graphic on the left and text on the right, all in a light olive green colour on a white background. The graphic consists of a curved arc encircling two elements: a series of vertical bars resembling a bar chart or urban structures, and a wheat or grain stalk. To the right of the graphic, the text "Land Moni" is visible, with the remainder of the word "Monitoring" [partially obscured].
